app.title: IAM Next.js Example
app.description: Identity and Access Management example powered by Keycloak

home.title: Identity & Access Management Demo
home.subtitle: Secure authentication with Keycloak
home.description: This application demonstrates OpenID Connect authentication with Keycloak using Next.js 15 and NextAuth (Auth.js).
home.ctaText: Sign in with Keycloak to explore the protected areas of this demo.
home.loginPrompt: Please log in to access the full application.

admin.onlyAdmins: Only administrators can view and manage this page.
